# Third-party game mirrors

This directory contains browser-build mirrors used by the Hugo blog game pages.

- `server-survival/`: mirrored from `https://pshenok.github.io/server-survival/` on 2026-06-04. Upstream repository: `https://github.com/pshenok/server-survival`.
- `vimmaster/`: mirrored from `https://renzorlive.github.io/vimmaster/` on 2026-06-04. Upstream repository: `https://github.com/renzorlive/vimmaster`.
- `tailwindcss-browser.js`: mirrored from `https://cdn.tailwindcss.com` on 2026-06-04 for local iframe rendering.

Keep upstream license files with these mirrors when refreshing from the source repositories.
